texto: I munched a carrot, then broke off a piece of bread and teamed it with another bite of salmon. Every single bit could be a different taste sensation. It was like men. Each was unique. Most had some great qualities, the majority had a few disappointing ones, and a few were total losers.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Susan Fox: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “I munched a carrot, then broke off a piece of bread and teamed it with another bite of salmon. Ev…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, men, men-and-food pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de men-and-food.

texto: I have to wonder,” Aaron said, 'does your conscience whack you upside the head every time you contemplate taking a little time to just enjoy life?' - from Fly Away With Me
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Susan Fox que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I have to wonder,” Aaron said, 'does your conscience whack you upside the head every time you con…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, contemporary-romance, wonder, com foco em reflexao.
